caption: A woman with curly light-brown hair tied back wears black headphones and a black t-shirt with a white circular graphic. She is positioned in a studio setting, facing right and smiling while speaking. A professional black microphone is positioned in front of her. To her left is a screen displaying the name "Johnson" in red text above a blue and white graphic. To her right is a black wall featuring red and white text that reads "BOSS TALK 101" alongside a logo and the smaller text "Vol 11 Logo Only". Another small logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the screen behind her. Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, continuing to speak and smile, with only slight changes in her facial expression and head tilt as she talks.
